mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_board (user_id, content, parent_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM message_board m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.status = 1

SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM message_board m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.parent_id = 0 AND m.status = 1
ORDER BY m.like_count DESC, m.create_time DESC
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM message_board m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.parent_id = #{parentId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_board WHERE parent_id = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_board WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM message_board m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE message_board SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE message_board SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE message_board SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
